reviews.title: Need to consider before making a reservation.

The staff does not actively support customers. Special attention is needed regarding parking issues. Cars are parked on the sidewalk and roadway, and customers have to contact and move their cars themselves without any support from the staff.

reviews.text: Rooms were unclean with noticeable foul odour upon arrival, with visible hair and stain on bed. Dead lizard in the toilet & lights were very dim, and we stil had to pay for the day even though we didn’t stay for the night! Initially booked for 2 nights, we left the same afternoon upon check-in. Staff were unfriendly, wouldn’t recommend this hotel. Seems sketchy/ red light district type of hotel.

reviews.title: Don't book! Save your time and money!
reviews.positives: Nothing.
reviews.negatives:
I never write bad reviews about any businesses in general but this time I had to.

We had booked a deluxe double room for 3 nights with a sea view. First we were given a random room at 10th floor. Then I had to go back and show them that we had booked a specific room well in advance. Then the receptionist gave me another room at 5th floor with so called sea view where beach can't be seen and from only 5% of the window where you can see the ocean that too with particular angle. 

The rooms were really dirty, dust can be seen around the room and the bedsheets have little mites that bite at night. We were promised an iron which was never delivered.

Me and my wife were really upset and checked out the next day. Really ruined 1 day from our very limited, 10 days worth of trip in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Cockroach infestation
reviews.text: Our room had a cockroach infestation we returned from an evening in town to the scurrying across our beds, pillows, bags and bathroom. We asked the receptionist for another room which she very helpfully gave us however we found an even larger cockroach in the new room. We informed the receptionist we would not be staying and since we hadn’t used any of their amenities and only used the room as a baggage hold for the evening we would like a refund. She said we’d have to pay for half a night and we’d be refunded the rest. We insisted she speak to the manager as paying for half a night in a cockroach infesteted room seems a bit ridiculous to me, after speaking to the manager the agreed to refund is the entire amount via Agoda. We are still yet to receive our refund. So warning to all people considering staying here AVOID AT ALL COSTS. Compare the awful *** reviews about this hotel to the thousands of amazing reviews on Agoda and infer from that what you will.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The worst hotel

reviews.title: Should Not Stay
reviews.text:
Due to some work, I had to stay in Da Nang for an additional day, so I rented a room. I won't mention the price because Agoda has a discount program, so I'm not talking about whether it's cheap or expensive. However, when I checked in, the young staff had a very disrespectful attitude and wasn't very friendly. I assume it was because I booked a cheap room that they treated me this way?
- Secondly, I saw on Agoda that the room had a bathtub, but when I checked into the room, there wasn't one. I chose a double bed, but they gave me two single beds pushed together, which was very uncomfortable. I intended to ask about the bathtub, but the receptionist's attitude was unsatisfactory, so I didn't bother to ask since I was only staying for one day anyway.
- Thirdly, what kind of hotel is it that the front desk area is very dirty and the staff are oblivious? I understand they were cleaning the hotel, but it was very messy and smelly. As for the room, you shouldn't choose any of the odd-numbered rooms because they are very stuffy and have no windows. With that price, it was not appropriate; the rooms were clean, but the front desk area was just too dirty!

reviews.title: Dirty and under construction. STAY AWAY!
reviews.positives: The hotel staff thankfully agreed to quickly process a full refund for the entirety of our reservation upon request. We checked in but then immediately decided to leave given the dirty and poor condition of the room and hotel.
reviews.negatives: The hotel room itself was very dirty. We noticed immediately that the pleather headboard of one bed was filthy and used a wet wipe to clean it and dirt and God knows what else came off onto the wipe. Since the headboard had a pleather surface that was easily wipeable, that means that no one had ever cleaned it prior to us. There were stains on the tails of the curtains right above the bed. The bath mat to the bathroom also had dirt on it and sandal prints like someone had already stepped all over it. The AC remote was dirty as well and the AC seemed to not work. In the hotel lobby, there was a loose light hanging on by its wires right by the reception desk where you could easily hit your head. We booked this hotel for the beautiful bar and breakfast/dining area shown in the photos, but when we went up there, the entire floor had been emptied and stripped down to the bare floor and walls, with large open electrical wires hanging out everywhere. This hotel was not only dirty but also a safety hazard. We immediately decided to check out and had to find another hotel on the day of to salvage our trip in Da Nang.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: When checking in, the staff informed me that there were no available rooms, despite the booking system showing availability. The staff suggested taking a lower-grade room, but I refused because I had paid for a sea view room. The staff mentioned that guests with regular bookings might be offered different rooms; I had to wait for a while before a room became available. Upon checking into the room, it was not clean, and there were old towels from previous guests in the closet. The toilet and shower had broken lights that were only fixed on the third day, and the bathroom did not drain well. The staff handled everything slowly. When the lights were being repaired, the staff did not knock on the door but entered the room unannounced. Even after the repairs, the staff did not clean the bathroom after being contacted. I had an unsatisfactory experience staying here.

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text:
We were charged *** a night for the room directly in front of the elevator. It was a regular sized room with 1 bed. We definitely were overcharged in my honest opinion. The majority of the photos of this place are AI generated so you won't get the real experience until you arrive.

We started off in room *** , the fridge didn't work, the kettle was disgusting,  the toilet sprayer started leaking for days and the dampness from the mildew mold in the bedroom made me sick after 3 days I couldn't breathe in there and asked to be moved to a different room because I started coughing runny nose and sneezing uncontrollably in that room but I was fine when I was outside. Even the bed sheets/comforter was wet/moist and I never experienced that.  For the remainder of our stay we were in room *** in front of the elevator that room was much better I could breathe and it had a window, but the shower doesn't consistently drain while you're in it it starts to flood. 

You definitely can hear everybody showering, other people talking from other rooms on your floor, everybody at the elevator and all the airplanes. If you're looking for quiet you may not get that here. Also the wifi worked for the most part but it had days where it was slow/lagging. 

If you leave the sign on your door for them to clean the room they will and change your towels each day, take out the trash, make the bed. 

On our last morning I forgot my pink yoga matt it was still wrapped and brand new I tried to go back to get it and miraculously none of the house keeping could find it so I guess it must've got up and walked away on its own. No someon stole it.

A better experience I've had is renting a room on ***  from a local family for *** /night

reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

We are truly sorry to learn that the condition of the room caused such discomfort that you chose to check out earlier than planned. A mold or mildew odor is certainly not acceptable, and we sincerely apologize for the unpleasant experience this created during your stay.

Your feedback is being taken very seriously. We have shared your comments with our housekeeping and maintenance teams so that the room and surrounding areas can be thoroughly inspected and properly addressed to prevent similar situations in the future.

We deeply regret that we were unable to provide the comfortable environment you deserved and appreciate you bringing this matter to our attention. We hope there may be an opportunity in the future to welcome you back and offer a much improved experience.

Sincerely,

reviews.text: Though the beach is quite close, "private beach" is completely misleading as it is publicly accessible. They only take cash for the room, but there is no bank or ATM close by (nor did they recommend where to take out money). They did allow us to check in without paying by keeping one of our passports, so it wasn't the worst inconvenience. The room was dirty. The TV had no remote and was actually broken. Staff didn't do anything to fix it or remedy the situation, just said the maintenance person would be by the next day and they were not. The bedsheets had grease stains. I tried to message the number for customer complaints but no one responded. Overall, I would only recommend this place if you want something right by the beach and will not be spending much time in the room.

reviews.title: Advantages and Disadvantages of Ocean Star Hotel Da Nang
reviews.text: The convenience point is the geographical location, such as being 2-3 km from the airport, close to markets (Han, Con), and just a few steps away from the beach (Thanh Khe) (the beach in this area is very clean because it is not a famous bathing spot). Everything would be fine if the requirement is just a place to sleep and convenience for travel, but if one expects cleanliness and relaxation, then definitely not. On the first day of arrival, there was trash in the elevator, the elevator floor was very dirty, the water pressure was weak, the room looked old, the mattress felt very dusty and gritty, and the spring mattress ensured that anyone not used to it would have a terrible backache.

Je suis rentré dans la chambre 10 minutes j’ai vu ma chambre complètement sale avec des insectes absolument sur tout les meubles (des petites fourmis de partout et quelques cafards) je suis redescendu directement dire que ça n’allait pas on m’as répondu (le propriétaire qui n’était pas sur place) qu’il fallait le dire direct (ce que j’ai fais mais bon…) et que la je dois payer la moitié de la nuit. 
Après de longue minutes de débats j’ai finalement demandé un compromis de prendre 1 nuit et de partir le lendemain pour prendre un hôtel à premier abord refusé mais j’ai pu faire la demande sur l’appli ce à quoi ils ont finalement plié. J’ai donc passer 1 nuit sans fermer l’oeil à attendre l’aube puis je me suis enfui le lendemain après avoir payer. Je vous laisse observer les images d’une chenille en décomposition sur le bureau en train de se faire déguster par un essaim de fourmis j’ai filmé plus pris quelques photos. Je trouve ça pas normal de réservez un hôtel qui ne ressemble absolument pas aux photos et par supplément sale. Cordialement.

reviews.title: Catastrophique
reviews.positives:
Ce séjour était catastrophique sur tous les points… 
Je veux bien qu’on prenne un hôtel un peu plus low cost, et que c’est arrangeant financièrement, mais il ne faut pas exagérer. 
La première chambre qui nous a été attribuée, empestait la poussière et l’humidité et était envahie de fourmis.
On nous a juste proposé de pulvériser de l’insecticide… 
Après insistance, nous avons eu le droit de changer de chambre.
Cette fois, notre chambre avait une odeur d’égouts , il n’y avait pas d’eau chaude mais à peine tiède, et un filet d’eau pour se laver, impossible de me rincer les cheveux une fois shampouiné! Quand nous l’avons signalé, une dame est montée et laissé couler  l’eau pendant 10 minutes et nous a dit que c’était pour la sécurité enfants, que la température ne se montait pas plus que ça… Or, dans la chambre précédente, nous pouvions régler la température… Et là il ne faut pas exagérer, l’eau était à peine tiède…
Je trouve ça, inadmissible qu’on nous ai pas proposé une autre solution, une chambre adéquate, ou un surclassement, c’est minimum ce qui se serait passé partout ailleurs! ou un remboursement d’une nuit… L’hôtel n’est pas très propre.
Et on a clairement l’impression de ne pas être pris au sérieux, on se fout de nous… Alors je vous conseille de rajouter quelques euros et de changer d’hôtel. 
Sans parler, qu’il n’est pas isolé, et j’ai l’impression que les avions décolle de ma chambre.
Dernier. Point, nous sommes quand même dans un hôtel, qui apparaît sur Booking. Et à chaque fois, c’est le même cinéma, on essaye de nous faire payer en cash !!!!

This property has a few rough edges, but has potential to be a really fun place. They do a lot of things right, and have a positive attitude. Lots of room for improvement though. Feels like maybe it was once a hip hotel, but now they have let a few things slip. That’s okay by me, I’m willing to turn a blind eye when I can get a super good hotel rate there for a few days in a row. 
Great staff!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Après avoir fait le check-in à 12h, nous avons tout de suite prévenu la réception qu’il y avait une fuite dans la salle de bain venant du robinet, ce qui faisait en sorte que tout le sol était inondé. Suite à quoi on nous a répondu que cela allait être réglé vers 14h.

Nous avons passé la journée dehors et sommes rentrés vers 21h lorsque nous avons constaté que le problème n’avait pas été réglé, puisque la salle de bain était toujours inondée. Nous sommes donc retournés à la réception où on nous a dit qu’ils allaient s’en occuper demain, alors que nous avions de toute façon réservé que pour une nuit et donc quitté la chambre le lendemain.

La moindre des choses aurait été de nous prévenir du fait qu'il n'allait pas régler le problème comme prévu vers 14h et de nous changer de chambre ou d'au moins avoir un dédommagement. (Surtout que nous avions payé un supplément pour avoir une chambre avec vue.)

reviews.title: Einfach nur schlecht
reviews.negatives: Das Hotel war all in all total dreckig! Überall liegt Müll, an den Oberflächen war eine dicke Staubschicht, die Duschwand wurde dem Dreck nach zu urteilen das letzte Mal vor einem halben Jahr geputzt. Im Badezimmer schimmelt es und riecht dementsprechend total muffig. In den Fluren stehen Aschenbecher, der Geruch ist wirklich nicht zu ertragen gewesen. Ich habe wirklich selten so dreckige Fenster gesehen. Das einzige was sauber war, war das Bett! Ansonsten sind auf den Oberflächen überall Flecken gewesen. Die Frau an der Rezeption war nett, ansonsten war es das mit den positiven Dingen!!! Ich frage mich wirklich, wie dieses Hotel 8 Sterne haben kann. Es wirkt so, als wenn es einmal ein gutes Hotel gewesen ist, es jemand billig gekauft hat und nun wirklich nur das nötigste tut, um Geld zu verdienen. Ich war schon in vielen Hotels, das hier ist mindestens das zweitschlechteste, das ich je erlebt habe. Gebt lieber etwas mehr Geld aus, aber geht lieber nicht in dieses Hotel.

Alles wirkt abgenutzt und nicht sonderlich gepflegt, Personal ist unbeholfen und nicht Professionell. Der Strand oder  Stadtblick ist ein Witz es sind jeweils zwei kleine Fenster, die Hauptfront des Hotels ist nach Süden ausgerichtet, also hat nie ein Gast einen wirklichen Ausblick auf das Meer.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Die Lage des Hotels ist erstmal seltsam, weil man wirklich weit vom Hauptstrand und damit auch von den Touristen weg ist, aber beim zweiten Hingucken wird man feststellen das der "Stadtstrand eigentlich viel schöner ist und auch besser zum Baden geeignet (Wenn das Wetter passt). Ausserdem liegt das Hotel SEHR nah zum Flughafen und zum eigentlichen vietnamesischen Zentrum. Das Personal war sehr hilfreich, auch wenn sie kaum Englisch gesprochen haben. Trip nach Hue City, wirklich gut. Motoroller mieten, ausgezeichnet.
reviews.negatives: Die hohe Bewertung des Hotels ist schlichtweg eine Frechheit, und Achtung, DAS HOTEL LIEGT IN DER EINFLUGSCHNEIßE (keine Ahnung warum das in KEINER Bewertung steht) Ich kann mir das einzig dadurch erklären das in den letzten Monaten ein neuer Besitzer das Hotel übernommen hat (Vermutung). Das Hotel ist eine komplette Baustelle. Einzelne Bereiche wie Konferenzraum, Essensraum, Panoramaraum sind komplette Baustellen und mit Staub und Schutt zugestellt. Auch die Zimmer sehen bei weitem nicht so aus wie auf den Bildern, alles verranzt und abgelebt. Warmes Wasser erst nach 10min, Zimmer stinken verschimmelt. Man muss allerdings schon sagen das ich Handwerker gesehen habe die in den Zimmer gearbeitet haben (Kein Baulärm), es wird also etwas am Hotel getan. Es ist aber schlichtweg eine Frechheit die aktuellen Bilder und Bewertungen für dieses Hotel als Grundlage für die Buchung zu nehmen.

reviews.title: No era lo esperado
reviews.text:
Tuvimos una mala experiencia con este hotel por varios motivos. Nos motivó que decía que estaba al lado de la playa, y asi es, pero una playa muy sucia y poco atractiva, nada parecido a las otras de la zona. 
Pero ahora lo más relevante: son reales los comentarios sobre cuartos sin luz, me toco uno sin ventana y estaba en penumbras, necesitaba trabajar con videollamadas y sería imposible ahí. Afortunadamente era un viaje familiar y pude cambiar con mi hermano. Al consultar a la recepción la atención fue compleja, no hablaban inglés, no había intención de comunicarse con el traductor y la chica me decía que entendía lo que decía pero en realidad no entendía nada. Me hizo sacar mis cosas diciendo que tenía otra habitación para mi y después no tenía nada y me pidió cambiar con mi familia. Lo peor de todo, lo que le pasó a mi hermano, le dieron una habitación donde entro y habían otros pasajeros ahí, los interrumpió en un mal momento si entienden lo que digo. Ah! Tampoco me dejaron toallas, sólo de mano. Si se hospedan ahí, sepan que no es un lugar turístico y la playa no es linda. Muy económico pero encontrarán buenos precios en mejores lugares de la ciudad también. Nos cambiamos al día siguiente y tuvimos un tiempo muy bueno en la ciudad.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Diese Unterkunft ist nicht empfehlenswert , weil die Zimmer nach Schimmel gestunken haben. Die Räumlichkeiten waren nicht sauber. Die Bilder täuschen und die hohe Bewertung verstehe ich bis heute nicht warum sie so hoch ausgefallen ist. Ich empfehle es niemanden hier zu buchen. Die Rezeption kann nicht richtig englisch. Es versteht dich keiner.
reviews.response:
Sehr geehrter Gast,

vielen Dank, dass Sie sich die Zeit genommen haben, Ihre Eindrücke zu schildern. Es tut uns aufrichtig leid zu lesen, dass Ihr Aufenthalt in keiner Weise Ihren Erwartungen entsprochen hat.

Der von Ihnen beschriebene Geruch nach Schimmel sowie mangelnde Sauberkeit sind absolut inakzeptabel und entsprechen keinesfalls unserem Anspruch an Qualität und Komfort. Ihre Hinweise wurden umgehend an die zuständigen Abteilungen weitergeleitet, damit eine gründliche Überprüfung und entsprechende Maßnahmen erfolgen.

Ebenso bedauern wir sehr, dass die Kommunikation an der Rezeption für Sie schwierig war. Eine klare und professionelle Verständigung ist essenziell für ein angenehmes Gästeerlebnis. Auch hier werden wir gezielt an Verbesserungen arbeiten.

Dass Sie unsere Darstellung und Bewertung als irreführend empfunden haben, nehmen wir sehr ernst. Es betrübt uns, dass wir Ihr Vertrauen nicht gewinnen konnten.

Bitte nehmen Sie unsere aufrichtige Entschuldigung an.

Mit freund

reviews.title: 여기는 사람이 잘곳이 못됩니다
reviews.text:
싸다고 예약하지마세요
베트남 여행중 최악의 숙소 3일치를 예약해는데 포기하고 그냥 근처 산토리 예약을 다시했습니다
왠만하면 돈아까워 자려고 했지만 도저히 잠을 못잘거 같아 나왔습니다 호텔 들어가는 순간부터 후회
reviews.response:
고객님께,

먼저 소중한 여행 중에 큰 실망을 드린 점 진심으로 사과드립니다. 베트남 여행 중 최악의 숙소라고 느끼셨다는 말씀에 저희도 무거운 마음입니다. 3일을 예약하셨음에도 불구하고 머무르지 못하시고 다른 호텔로 이동하셨다는 점에서 얼마나 불편하고 힘드셨을지 충분히 공감합니다.

호텔에 들어오시는 순간부터 후회가 되셨다고 하신 부분은 저희에게 매우 뼈아픈 지적입니다. 편안히 쉬셔야 할 공간이 오히려 불안과 불편을 드렸다는 것은 결코 있어서는 안 될 일입니다. 해당 내용은 내부적으로 면밀히 검토하여 시설과 서비스 전반에 대한 개선을 진행하겠습니다.

진심으로 기대에 미치지 못한 점 다시 한 번 사과드리며, 앞으로는 가격과 상관없이 기본적인 편안함과 만족을 드릴 수 있도록 더욱 노력하겠습니다.

감사합니다,

reviews.title: 가고싶지않은곳
reviews.text: 후기 첨 써봄 급으로 다낭 여행중 사진괜찮길래 2틀예약함 오후 비행기라 도착후 체크인 방 상태 깨끗하지 않고 냄새남 침대에 여자머리카락 많음 싸니까 그려려니햇는데 샤워하러 들어감 수압은 분무기 수준임 어떻게 씻으라는거지 자려고 누웠더니 머리위로 비행기 지나다님 그냥 자고 다음날 짐싸들고 나와서 다른숙소 예약함 하루치 숙소비 날림 완전 로컬지역이라 이쪽은 안갈듯
reviews.response:
고객님께,

먼저 소중한 시간을 내어 의견을 남겨주셔서 감사합니다. 투숙하시는 동안 객실 청결 상태와 침구 관리로 인해 큰 불편과 실망을 드린 점에 대해 진심으로 사과드립니다. 침대에서 머리카락을 발견하셨다는 말씀과 객실에서 불쾌한 냄새를 느끼셨다는 부분은 어떠한 경우에도 발생해서는 안 될 사항입니다.

또한 항공기 소음으로 인해 충분한 휴식을 취하지 못하셨다니 저희 또한 매우 안타깝게 생각합니다. 해당 내용은 즉시 하우스키핑 및 관련 부서에 전달하여 청결 점검과 관리 기준을 더욱 강화하도록 하겠습니다.

모처럼의 여행에서 편안한 시간을 보내지 못하시고 숙소를 변경하셔야 했던 점에 대해 다시 한번 깊이 사과드립니다. 앞으로는 더욱 세심하고 철저한 관리로 신뢰를 회복할 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.

감사합니다,

reviews.response:
尊敬的客人，

感谢您分享宝贵的入住感受。我们很高兴您认为在价格方面具有一定的性价比，这对我们来说是莫大的鼓励。

同时，我们也非常重视您提到酒店设施较旧、卫生状况一般的问题。对于未能在环境与整洁度方面达到您的期望，我们深表歉意。相关意见已反馈至管理及客房团队，我们将加强维护与清洁标准，持续提升整体品质。

衷心感谢您的坦诚评价，期待未来有机会为您带来更加舒适与满意的入住体验。

此致敬礼，

reviews.title: Nhân viên thái độ lồi lõm, mất dạy. Phòng tởm
reviews.text:
Gia đình tôi đến sớm, khách sạn quy định 14h nhận phòng thì chúng tôi chấp nhận. Nhưng đúng 14h quay lại thì chỉ giao 1 phòng, còn 1 phòng thì viện cớ ‘chưa dọn’ rồi bắt khách ngồi chờ hơn 1 tiếng đồng hồ. Khi lên được phòng thì nước nhỏ giọt, phòng xuống cấp cũ kỹ. Nhân viên thì thái độ lười nhác, vô trách nhiệm, lễ tân thì biến mất không thấy mặt.
Thật sự đây là khách sạn tệ hại nhất tôi từng gặp – vừa cẩu thả, vừa coi thường khách. Đừng bao giờ tin mấy cái review 5 sao ảo ở đây, toàn trò lừa bịp. Ai không muốn bực mình, mất tiền oan thì né xa cái nơi làm ăn mất dạy này ra.
My family arrived early and we understood the hotel’s check-in time was 2:00 PM. Fine. But when we came back at 2:00, only one room was given, the other was ‘still being cleaned’ — and we were left waiting more than an hour. Finally, when we got in, the water pressure was pathetic, the room was old and worn-out. Staff were lazy and careless, reception was nowhere to be seen.
This is by far the worst hotel I’ve ever experienced — sloppy, dishonest and completely disrespectful to guests. Don’t be fooled by the fake 5-star reviews here. If you don’t want to waste your money and ruin your trip, stay far away from this disgraceful place

reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã chia sẻ thẳng thắn về trải nghiệm của mình. Chúng tôi vô cùng tiếc khi biết rằng phòng ở chưa đạt kỳ vọng về sự mới mẻ và sạch sẽ, đội ngũ nhân viên chưa mang đến cảm giác thân thiện, cũng như dịch vụ ăn sáng và hình ảnh hiển thị chưa đáp ứng đúng mong đợi của Quý khách.

Những điều Quý khách phản ánh là hoàn toàn nghiêm túc và chúng tôi không xem nhẹ. Ban quản lý đã ghi nhận để rà soát lại chất lượng vệ sinh phòng, tác phong phục vụ của nhân viên cũng như thông tin và hình ảnh trên các kênh đặt phòng nhằm đảm bảo tính minh bạch và chính xác.

Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì đã chưa mang lại trải nghiệm tương xứng. Hy vọng trong tương lai, Quý khách sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội được cải thiện và phục vụ tốt hơn.

Trân trọng,

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng ốc sạch sẽ, nội thất còn mới, chất lượng oke so với giá cả
reviews.negatives: Rcm khách sạn có thể xem xét đổi màu đèn trong phòng. Phòng mình book có đèn vàng, buổi sáng thì ko sao, tới buổi tối thì nhìn đúng âm u luôn. Không biết các phòng còn lại có như vậy ko. Còn một vấn đề nữa là phòng ko có cách âm, các phòng cũng sát nhau nên mình bị mất ngủ vì tiếng ồn của những phòng bên cạnh trong khi bình thường mình là một đứa rất dễ ngủ. Đem điều này phản ánh với bạn lễ tân thì nhận đc một phản ứng khá thờ ơ nên mình cũng hơi hụt hẫng. Hy vọng ksan có thể khắc phục đc điểm này là oke hơn nhiều ạ.

KHÔNG QUAY LẠI
1. Phòng bẩn, rất bụi, không biết có dọn dẹp đàng hoàng không, phòng chỉ có đèn vàng không đủ sáng, lúc mình checkin không có cả giấy vệ sinh, ở 2 người mà chỉ có 1 đôi dép trong phòng.
2. Đặt phòng đôi mà lấy 2 giường đơn ghép lại, nằm xoay qua xoay lại là hai cái nệm bị tách ra thành 1 khoảng trống chính giữa.
3. Bạn nhân viên ca sáng lúc mình checkin khá là chậm, không nhiệt tình, nói lí nhí trong miệng, đưa lộn phòng cho khách mà không xin lỗi được một câu. Thấy bạn bận làm gì khác hơn là chú tâm vào công việc :)))
